articles.title: A Bouquet and a Sentiment Lula Greene Richards
A Friend of the Helpless Dead
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 486-489, but the article 'A Friend of the Helpless Dead' is listed on page 483 in the table of contents. The images show content about 'Mothers in Israel' (pages 427-430) and 'Red Cross Work in the Relief Society' (page 430), but do not contain the missing article from page 483.
